title: helichrysum rutilans
intro: Helichrysum rutilans, also known as the Coppery Everlasting, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum rutilans include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as essential oils and infusions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation, reduce pain, and support overall well-being.
